allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d.get\('tag_name',''\)\); [print\(a['name'], a['browser_download_url']\) for a in d.get\('assets',[]\)]")

Bash(/d/MATLAB/bin/matlab -batch "addpath\(genpath\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\)\); tests = {'test_step1_plume','test_step2_density','test_step3_centroid','test_step4_lloyd','test_step5_comparison','test_step6_main','test_step7_visualization'}; all_pass = true; for i = 1:length\(tests\), fprintf\('\\n=== Running %s ===\\n', tests{i}\); try, feval\(tests{i}\); catch ME, fprintf\('ERROR: %s\\n', ME.message\); all_pass = false; end; end; fprintf\('\\n\\n====== FINAL: All tests %s ======\\n', string\(all_pass\)\);")

Bash(matlab -batch "cd\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\); addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); params=init_parameters\(\); load_dummy=0; save_dir=fullfile\(pwd,'测试结果','Step8_动态扩散边界追踪'\); H_adaptive=[6.96e10,4.34e10]; H_static=[4.16e10,6.28e10]; H_random=[2.97e10,4.34e10]; boundary_distances=[150,46]; plume_extent=[1.79e4,4.54e5]; write_step8_analysis\(save_dir,H_adaptive,H_static,H_random,boundary_distances,plume_extent,params\);")

Bash(matlab -batch "cd\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\); clear functions; addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); params=init_parameters\(\); save_dir=fullfile\(pwd,'测试结果','Step8_动态扩散边界追踪'\); H_adaptive=[6.96e10,4.34e10]; H_static=[4.16e10,6.28e10]; H_random=[2.97e10,4.34e10]; boundary_distances=[150,46]; plume_extent=[1.79e4,4.54e5]; write_step8_analysis\(save_dir,H_adaptive,H_static,H_random,boundary_distances,plume_extent,params\);")

Bash(matlab -batch "cd\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\); addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); params=init_parameters\(\); rng\(42\); pos=init_agents\(params\); prev=[]; for step=1:params.sim.total_time; t=step*params.algorithm.dt; [pos,centroids,~,sample_data]=lloyd_iteration\(pos,t,prev,params\); prev=centroids; end; domain=params.domain; nx=38; ny=30; nz=26; x=linspace\(domain.xmin,domain.xmax,nx\); y=linspace\(domain.ymin,domain.ymax,ny\); z=linspace\(domain.zmin,domain.zmax,nz\); [X,Y,Z]=ndgrid\(x,y,z\); pts=[X\(:\),Y\(:\),Z\(:\)]; C=gaussian_plume_3d\(pts\(:,1\),pts\(:,2\),pts\(:,3\),params.sim.total_time*params.algorithm.dt,params\); active=C>=params.plume.boundary_threshold*max\(C\); [~,nearest]=min\(pdist2\(pts,pos\),[],2\); counts=zeros\(params.agent.num,1\); for i=1:params.agent.num; counts\(i\)=nnz\(nearest==i & active\); end; disp\('FINAL_POS='\); disp\(pos\); disp\('ACTIVE_VORONOI_COUNTS='\); disp\(counts'\); disp\('ACTIVE_AGENT_COUNT='\); disp\(nnz\(counts>0\)\); disp\('BOUNDARY_ASSIGN_COUNTS='\); disp\(accumarray\(sample_data.boundary_assign,1,[params.agent.num,1]\)'\); disp\('MONITORING_FRACTION='\); disp\(compute_monitoring_fraction\(pos,sample_data.boundary_points,params\)\);")

Bash(matlab -batch "cd\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\); clear functions; addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); params=init_parameters\(\); rng\(42\); pos=init_agents\(params\); prev=[]; for step=1:params.sim.total_time, t=step*params.algorithm.dt; [pos,cen,~,sd]=lloyd_iteration\(pos,t,prev,params\); prev=cen; end; [bp,ba,bd]=sample_plume_boundary\(pos,params.sim.total_time*params.algorithm.dt,params\); d=zeros\(params.agent.num,1\); c=zeros\(params.agent.num,1\); for i=1:params.agent.num, m=ba==i; c\(i\)=nnz\(m\); if any\(m\), d\(i\)=mean\(vecnorm\(bp\(m,:\)-pos\(i,:\),2,2\)\); else, d\(i\)=NaN; end; end; disp\('PER_AGENT_BOUNDARY_COUNTS='\); disp\(c'\); disp\('PER_AGENT_BOUNDARY_DISTANCE='\); disp\(d'\); disp\('FINAL_POSITIONS='\); disp\(pos\); disp\(['MEAN_BOUNDARY_DISTANCE=',num2str\(bd\)]\);")

Bash(matlab -batch "cd\('d:/science/3Dvoronoi'\); clear functions; addpath\(genpath\('.'\)\); params=init_parameters\(\); rng\(42\); pos=init_agents\(params\); prev=[]; for step=1:params.sim.total_time, t=step*params.algorithm.dt; [pos,cen,~,sd]=lloyd_iteration\(pos,t,prev,params\); prev=cen; end; [bp,ba,bd]=sample_plume_boundary\(pos,params.sim.total_time*params.algorithm.dt,params\); d=zeros\(params.agent.num,1\); c=zeros\(params.agent.num,1\); for i=1:params.agent.num, m=ba==i; c\(i\)=nnz\(m\); if any\(m\), d\(i\)=mean\(vecnorm\(bp\(m,:\)-pos\(i,:\),2,2\)\); else, d\(i\)=NaN; end; end; disp\('PER_AGENT_BOUNDARY_COUNTS='\); disp\(c'\); disp\('PER_AGENT_BOUNDARY_DISTANCE='\); disp\(d'\); disp\(['MAX_AGENT_DISTANCE=',num2str\(max\(d\)\)]\); disp\(['MEAN_BOUNDARY_DISTANCE=',num2str\(bd\)]\);")
